revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R unprintworthy |name=From an unprintworthy page title |from=a title that would {{big|''not''}} be helpful in a [[Meta:Paper Wikipedia|printed]] or [[WP:1|CD/DVD]] version of Wikipedia |info=See '''[[Wikipedia:Printability]]''' and '''[[WP:Version 1.0 Editorial Team|Version 1.0 Editorial Team]]''' for more information. |main category=Unprintworthy redirects }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: /* top */ converting to semantic emphasis, limiting use of bold

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
